hero.subtitle: A service for selecting verified tutors with reviews based on many different criteria.

payment.title: Pay after the lesson, no upfront costs
payment.description: You risk nothing. You only pay after your lesson has been successfully completed.

budget.title: Fits any budget
budget.description: We offer teachers at various price points. Simply tell us your budget, and we'll match you with the right tutor.

format.title: Flexible formats
format.description: Study online or in-person with a local teacher. We have tutors available across all cities in Uzbekistan.

collections.title: Online course collections for any goal

items.freelance: Be independent and work for yourself
items.remote: Work freelance from anywhere in the world
items.investing: Learn to invest and spend wisely
